result.preview:
"DuckDB query execution error (CatalogException): Catalog Error: Table with name Product2 does not exist!
Did you mean "main.duckdb_types"?

LINE 1: ..., p.Name AS ProductName FROM OpportunityLineItem oli LEFT JOIN products_orders.Product2 p ON TRIM(REPLACE(p.Id,'#','')...
                                                                          ^"

args.query: SELECT oli.Id, oli.OpportunityId, oli.Quantity, oli.TotalPrice, oli.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName FROM OpportunityLineItem oli LEFT JOIN products_orders.Product2 p ON TRIM(REPLACE(p.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oli.Product2Id,'#','')) WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(oli.OpportunityId,'#','')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO';

exec_args.sql: SELECT oli.Id, oli.OpportunityId, oli.Quantity, oli.TotalPrice, oli.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName FROM OpportunityLineItem oli LEFT JOIN products_orders.Product2 p ON TRIM(REPLACE(p.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oli.Product2Id,'#','')) WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(oli.OpportunityId,'#','')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO';

args.query: SELECT c.Id, c.Status, c.StartDate, c.CustomerSignedDate, c.CompanySignedDate, c.Description, c.ContractTerm FROM Contract c WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#','')) IN (SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(ContractID__c,'#','')) FROM Opportunity WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(Id,'#',''))='006Wt000007BGGjIAO') ;

exec_args.sql: SELECT c.Id, c.Status, c.StartDate, c.CustomerSignedDate, c.CompanySignedDate, c.Description, c.ContractTerm FROM Contract c WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#','')) IN (SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(ContractID__c,'#','')) FROM Opportunity WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(Id,'#',''))='006Wt000007BGGjIAO') ;

args.query: SELECT Id, OpportunityId, Product2Id, Quantity, TotalPrice FROM OpportunityLineItem WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(OpportunityId,'#','')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, OpportunityId, Product2Id, Quantity, TotalPrice FROM OpportunityLineItem WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(OpportunityId,'#','')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO';

var_call_mz2zhWIrgvtww817iBX6EyD5.Description: DataWave Analytics seeks to enhance its data science services with TechPulse's AI-driven tools.
